name: Fat-Free Chewy Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray cookie sheets with cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Stir in corn syrup and egg whites until blended (the dough will be thick and slightly sticky).
3. Drop rounded teaspoonsful of dough onto prepared cookie sheets.
4. Bake at 350°F for 7-9 minutes or until just set. (Cookies will be soft when pressed. Do not overbake.)
5. Cool on a wire rack. Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
